caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard is seated in a sound-treated room with dark, vertically ribbed acoustic foam walls. He wears black over-ear headphones and a black jacket over a grey shirt. Positioned directly in front of his face is a professional condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, and his facial expressions shift from a focused gaze to a slightly more wide-eyed, expressive look. He uses hand gestures to emphasize his points, raising his right arm and hand above his head. The camera remains in a static medium close-up, capturing his upper body and head as he interacts with someone off-screen. The lighting is dim and consistent, focusing on the subject against the dark background of the recording studio.
